NEED_TO_REGISTER_MSG: You need to create an account on {{host}} to trade.
REG_STATUS_MSG: In order to trade at {{host}}, your pending bond(s) need to be confirmed.
BOND_CREATION_PENDING_MSG: In order to trade at {{host}} bond(s) will be created shortly.
SET_PENALTY_COMPS: Your account has {{penalties}} penalties but is only authorized for {{penaltyComps}} penalty comps.
ACCT_TIER_POST_BOND: Your account tier is {{tier}}. You need to post new bonds to trade.
ENABLE_BOND_MAINTENANCE: Enable bond maintenance from DEX Settings page.
UPDATE_PENALTY_COMPS: Update penalty comps from DEX Settings page.
RATE_BELOW_MIN_MSG: Rate must be at least {{ minRate }}
ORDER_DISCLAIMER: IMPORTANT: Trades take time to settle, and you cannot turn off the {{brand}} software, or the {{quoteTicker}} or {{baseTicker}} blockchain and/or wallet software, until settlement is complete. Settlement can complete as quickly as a few minutes or take as long as a few hours.
REG_SET_APP_PW_MSG: Set your password. This is the password that unlocks {{brand}} for use.
SEED_SAME_WALLET_WARNING: Do not use a wallet created with the same seed in two places.
RECOVER_WARNING: Recovering your wallet will move all wallet data to a backup folder. You will have to wait until the wallet syncs with the network, which could potentially take a long time, before you can use the wallet again.
CONFIRM_FORCE_MESSAGE: This wallet is actively managing orders. After taking this action, it will take a long time to resync your wallet, potentially causing orders to fail. Only take this action if absolutely necessary!
PW_FOR_WALLET_SEED: Enter your app password to show the wallet seed. Make sure nobody else can see your screen. If anyone gets access to the wallet seed, they will be able to steal all of your funds.
EXPORT_WALLET_DISCLAIMER: Using an externally restored wallet while you have active trades running in the DEX could result in failed trades and LOST FUNDS. It is recommended that you do not export your wallet unless you are an experienced user and you know what are doing.
EXPORT_WALLET_MSG: Below are the seeds needed to restore your wallet in some popular external wallets. DO NOT make transactions with your external wallet while you have active trades running on the DEX.
CLIPBOARD_WARNING: Copy/Pasting a wallet seed is a potential security risk. Do this at your own risk.
UNREADY_WALLETS_MSG: Your wallets must be connected and unlocked before trades can be processed. Resolve this ASAP!
APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BUY: Token approval is required before buying
APPROVAL_REQUIRED_SELL: Token approval is required before selling
APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BOTH: Token approval is required before trading
NO_TOKEN_ALLOWANCES: You have not granted allowances for any swap contracts for this token.
TOKEN_UNAPPROVAL_TX_MSG: Your token approval has been removed with transaction ID:
QUICKCONFIG_WALLET_HEADER: We can activate these native wallets now. Configure additional wallets from the Wallets view.
QUICKCONFIG_WALLET_ERROR_HEADER: Errors encountered when creating the following wallets. Wallets can be configured in the Wallets view.
SAVE_SEED_INSTRUCTIONS: Save the following seed somewhere safe. Do not share this with anybody.
RESET_APP_PW_MSG: Reset your app password using your app seed. If you provide the correct app seed, you can login again with the new password.
CSPP_HOW: StakeShuffle creates outputs that cannot be definitively linked to previous on-chain activity. While output amounts are still visible in this form of privacy, the destruction of traceability means your on-chain history can no longer be inferred from publicly available data.
PRIVACY_INTRO: When privacy is enabled, all of your funds will be sent through an address history obfuscation service using a protocol called StakeShuffle.
DECRED_PRIVACY: Decred's form of privacy is especially powerful because Decred wallets integrate privacy with staking, which facilitates a consistently large anonymity set, a critical feature for privacy.
PRIVACY_OPTIONAL: Privacy is completely optional, and can be disabled at any time. There are increased transaction fees associated with privacy, but these fees have historically been relatively negligible.
PRIVACY_UNLOCKED: The wallet must remain unlocked while mixing.
NEW_USER_BANNER_MSG: New to Bison Wallet? Read some important tips before you start trading.
NO_DESTINATIONS: No bridge destinations available for this asset
MUST_RESERVE_FUNDS_FOR_FEES_MAX_BRIDGEAB: Must reserve funds for fees (max bridgeable: {{max}})
THIS_BRIDGE_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_BRIDGING_AM: This bridge does not support bridging amounts outside of these limits.
IF_YOU_REMOVE_THE_ALLOWANCE_FOR_THIS_VER: If you remove the allowance for this version of the swap contract, you will no longer be able to trade until you re-allow it.
TRADE_DISABLED_PROVIDERS: Wallet provider redundancy is too low to safely place a new trade.
FORCE_SIGN_OUT_WARNING: Sign out with open/in-progress orders is dangerous, and can lead to a loss of funds. Either cancel open orders or wait for those in-progress to complete. If you still want to sign out - do it at your own risk.
DELETE_ARCHIVED_RECORDS_RESULT: Message: {{ nRecords }} archived records has been deleted
SELECT_WALLET_FOR_FEE_PAYMENT: Select a valid wallet to post a bond
REFUND_IMMINENT: Will happen in the next few blocks
PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS_MSG: Your password reset was successful. You can proceed to login with your new password.
ENABLE_ASSET_WALLET_MSG: Enable / Activate a {{ asset }} wallet to trade
CREATE_ASSET_WALLET_MSG: Create a {{ asset }} wallet to trade
NO_WALLET_MSG: Create {{ asset1 }} and {{ asset2 }} wallet to trade
MM_NEED_WALLET: You must create a {{ asset }} wallet to market make on this market.
MM_WALLET_DISABLED: The {{ asset }} wallet is disabled. Please enable it to market make on this market.
MM_NEED_ASSET_APPROVAL: You must approve the {{ asset }} asset to market make on this market.
MM_MARKET_NOT_AVAILABLE: This market is not supported for this bot type
MM_DRIFT_TOLERANCE_TOOLTIP: If an existing DEX order drifts too far from the bot's current target price, the bot cancels and replaces it.
MM_ORDER_PERSISTENCE_TOOLTIP: How many epochs an unfilled arbitrage order can remain open before the bot cancels it.
MM_INTERMEDIATE_ASSET_TOOLTIP: The CEX asset the bot routes through to complete the second leg of a multi-hop hedge.
MM_COMPLETION_ORDER_TYPE_TOOLTIP: Controls how the bot finishes the second CEX trade in a multi-hop hedge. Market orders favor completion. Limit orders favor price control but can leave funds temporarily stuck in the intermediate asset.
MM_LIMIT_BUFFER_TOOLTIP: When using a limit order for the second leg, the bot worsens the price by this amount to improve the chance of a fill.
MM_PROFIT_THRESHOLD_DESC: Minimum profit required after the DEX order fills and the hedge is placed on the CEX.
MM_PROFIT_THRESHOLD_MM_TOOLTIP: Sets the minimum half-spread \u2014 how far the innermost buy and sell placements start from the market. Additional levels are placed farther out using Price Increment.
MM_PRICE_INCREMENT_TOOLTIP: Sets how much farther from the market each additional placement level sits.
MM_MATCH_BUFFER_TOOLTIP: Makes the bot price against more CEX liquidity than the exact placement size. Higher values are more conservative and can make the hedge easier to complete if top-of-book liquidity disappears.
MM_MIN_TRANSFER_TOOLTIP: Real deposits and withdrawals below this size are skipped. Use this to avoid excessive fee churn on small transfers.
MM_FAILED_FETCH_BRIDGE_FEES: Failed to fetch bridge fees and limits
MM_BRIDGE_CONFIG_TOOLTIP: The DEX and CEX use different assets or networks for this side of the market. Choose which CEX asset to bridge to and which bridge to use for rebalance transfers.
MM_CEX_REBALANCE_DESC: The bot may move funds between wallet and CEX accounts when that improves inventory balance, subject to the minimum transfer sizes below.
MM_INTERNAL_TRANSFERS_DESC: The bot may reassign currently unreserved funds between the DEX side and CEX side in its internal inventory model, but it will not perform real deposits or withdrawals.
MM_REBALANCE_DESCRIPTION: Control how the bot shifts inventory between its DEX side and CEX side when one side runs low.
MM_MISSING_FIAT_RATES: Fiat rate data is not available for {{ assetSymbols }}.
MM_PERCENT_PLUS_DESC: Places orders at a fixed percentage from the market mid-gap, then adds the estimated break-even gap.
MM_PERCENT_DESC: Places orders at a fixed percentage from the market mid-gap, without adding break-even costs.
MM_ABSOLUTE_PLUS_DESC: Places orders at a fixed rate distance from the market mid-gap, then adds the estimated break-even gap.
MM_ABSOLUTE_DESC: Places orders at a fixed rate distance from the market mid-gap, without adding break-even costs.
MM_MULTIPLIER_DESC: Places orders using a multiple of the estimated break-even gap.
MM_COMPETITIVE_DESC: Picks an order rate that tries to compete with the best buy/sell orders in the book but also keeps away from the basis rate far enough to respect specified gap value.
MM_PROFIT_ADV_DESC: Minimum profit required after the DEX trade and its CEX hedge are both accounted for.
MM_PRIORITY_TOOLTIP: Higher rows are kept first if balance is not enough to fund every placement.
MM_ADV_PLACEMENTS_DESC: Set each target placement explicitly, in priority order.
MM_SETTINGS_DESC: Configure live bot behavior, wallet funding options, and optional data collection.
MM_MULTI_HOP_LOCKED: These multi-hop route settings cannot be changed while the bot is running.
MM_MARKET_ORDER_WARNING: Market orders can lose funds in thin markets or during high volatility.
MM_COLLECT_SNAPSHOTS_TOOLTIP: Subscribe to server-signed epoch snapshots for this market while the bot is running. You can export them later to independently verify market-making activity.
MM_NO_CEX_AVAILABLE: No connected CEX is available for arbitrage yet, so only the DEX-only market maker can be used.
MM_BASIC_MM_DESC: Keeps buy and sell orders on the DEX order book. Profit comes from earning spread over time while providing liquidity.
MM_ARB_MM_DESC: Places standing DEX orders only where a profitable CEX hedge is available. When a DEX order fills, the bot immediately submits the offsetting trade on the CEX.
MM_BASIC_ARB_DESC: Waits for direct DEX/CEX arbitrage opportunities and submits the trade pair when one is profitable, instead of maintaining standing maker orders.
MM_CEX_CONFIG_PROMPT: Enter your {{ cexName }} API credentials so this bot can read balances and place hedge trades for arbitrage features.
MM_MANUAL_ALLOC_DESC: Set the bot allocation directly instead of using the automatic estimate.
MM_SELECT_MARKET_DESC: Choose the DEX market this bot will manage.
MM_REGISTER_HOST: Register on {{ host }} to use this market for market making
MM_PRICE_LEVELS_TOOLTIP: How many distinct buy prices and sell prices the bot should target.
MM_LOTS_USD_TOOLTIP: Toggle between specifying the number of lots per price level and the total USD value per side of the book.
MM_QUICK_PLACEMENTS_DESC: Set how many orders the bot aims to keep on each side of the book and how far from the market they should sit.
MM_BRIDGE_LOCKED: Bridge route settings cannot be changed while the bot is running.
MM_FUNDED_WITH_REBALANCE_TOOLTIP: The bot cannot satisfy this requirement from the current side alone, but rebalance settings allow it to shift more inventory to the needed side.
MM_QUICK_ALLOC_DESC: Automatically estimates the funds to reserve based on your placements, fees, and rebalance settings.
MM_ALLOC_RUNNING_QUICK: This bot is already running. The preview below shows only the allocation changes that will be applied \u2014 not the bot's new total.
MM_ALLOC_NEW_QUICK: This preview shows the total starting allocation that will be saved for the bot and reserved when it starts.
MM_ALLOC_RUNNING_MANUAL: This bot is already running. Enter the net amount to add to or remove from the bot's current allocation on each side.
MM_ALLOC_RUNNING_MANUAL_NOTE: Positive values add funds. Negative values remove funds that are currently available to the running bot.
MM_ALLOC_NEW_MANUAL: Enter the total amount to reserve for this bot on each side.
MM_EXTRA_BUY_LOTS_TOOLTIP: Adds buy-side lot capacity above the lots required by your configured placements.
MM_EXTRA_SELL_LOTS_TOOLTIP: Adds sell-side lot capacity above the lots required by your configured placements.
MM_SLIPPAGE_BUFFER_TOOLTIP: Adds extra funds above the expected trade amount so the bot can still complete trades if execution moves against it.
MM_EXTRA_BUY_FEE_TOOLTIP: Only used on token markets. Reserves extra copies of the estimated buy-side token fee budget because those fee balances are spent over time and are not replenished by the bot's trades.
MM_EXTRA_SELL_FEE_TOOLTIP: Only used on token markets. Reserves extra copies of the estimated sell-side token fee budget because those fee balances are spent over time and are not replenished by the bot's trades.
MM_EXTRA_REBALANCE_FEE_TOOLTIP: Reserves extra copies of estimated external rebalance costs, including bridge fees when used and the approximate wallet send fee for deposits.
ARE_YOU_SURE_YOU_WANT_TO_ACCELERATE_AGAI: Are you sure you want to accelerate again?
ARE_YOU_SURE_YOU_WANT_TO_ACCELERATE: Are you sure you want to accelerate?
ARE_YOU_SURE_YOU_WANT_TO_DISABLE_YOUR_AC: Are you sure you want to disable your account on
ARE_YOU_SURE_YOU_WANT_TO_REMOVE_THE_BOT_: Are you sure you want to remove the bot configuration for
BROWSER_NOTIFICATIONS_ARE_BLOCKED_PLEASE: Browser notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
CAST_YOUR_VOTE_ON_THIS_PROPOSAL: Cast your vote on this proposal
CREATE_PARENT_WALLET_FIRST: Create the {{parent}} wallet first — its token wallets are created automatically with it.
INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_DEPOSIT_TO_YOUR_PAR: Insufficient balance. Deposit to your {{parentName}} wallet:
NO_WALLET_CONFIGURED_FOR_THIS_ASSET: No wallet configured for this asset.
PLEASE_SELECT_A_VSP_TO_PURCHASE_TICKETS: Please select a VSP to purchase tickets.
SEED_BACKUP_MSG: It's highly recommended that you back up your application seed now. The application seed is critical to recovering your fidelity bonds and native wallets.
SCAN_THE_QR_CODE_WITH_THE_COMPANION_APP: Scan the QR code with the companion app.
SELECT_AN_ASSET_FROM_THE_SIDEBAR: Select an asset from the sidebar.
SEND_ENOUGH_FUNDS_TO_COVER_THE_BOND: Send enough funds to cover the bond.
THE_SWAP_TRANSACTION_WAS_BROADCAST_ONLY: The swap transaction was broadcast only
THIS_ADDRESS_HAS_BEEN_USED_CONSIDER_GENE: This address has been used. Consider generating a new one.
TOR_IS_NOT_ENABLED_ENABLE_TOR_TO_USE_THE: Tor is not enabled. Enable Tor to use the companion app.
WHATS_A_BOND_DESC: A fidelity bond is funds temporarily locked in an on-chain contract. After the contract expires, your wallet will reclaim the funds. On mainnet, funds are locked for 2 months.
WAITING_FOR_WALLET_SYNC_AND_FUNDS: Waiting for wallet sync and funds
TOO_CHEAP_TITLE: Stuck transaction — fees below network rate
TOO_CHEAP_BODY: Your {{asset}}{{network}} {{type}} transaction has fees below the current network rate and isn't being mined. Bump the fees to push it through, abandon it (the wallet will replace it with a 0-value self-send at the same nonce), or wait — you'll be reminded later if it's still stuck.
MISSING_NONCES_BODY: The {{asset}}{{network}} wallet detected one or more nonce values between its confirmed and pending nonce that aren't covered by any tracked transaction.
MISSING_NONCES_RECOVER_HINT: Recover will broadcast 0-value self-send transactions to fill the gaps so subsequent transactions can be mined. Ignore acknowledges the situation — the prompt won't reappear until the wallet restarts.
AUTO_BUMP_CAPPED_DETAILS: Auto fee-bump for the stuck {{type}} at nonce {{nonce}} hit its cap ({{feeCapGwei}} gwei, limit {{capGwei}} gwei) and won't go higher. The Bump fees / Abandon / Wait dialog will reappear within the next minute (or sooner on the next wallet tick) — pick Bump to push the fee further yourself, or Abandon to replace the tx with a 0-value self-send at the same nonce.
ACTION_REQUEST_FAILED: Failed to submit. Please try again.
UNKNOWN_ACTION_BODY: The wallet requested an action of type "{{actionID}}" that this UI doesn't recognize.
